title: Developer Personality Quiz
description: Find out what kind of developer you really are

props.title: What Kind of Dev Are You?

questions.question: It's Friday afternoon. You find a bug in production. What do you do?
options: Fix it immediately, deploy, go home
Write a detailed ticket and fix Monday
Investigate the root cause for 3 hours
Ask if anyone else noticed it
questions.explanation: The ship-it mentality! Speed + quality = senior energy.

questions.question: Your preferred way to name variables?
options: Short and sweet: x, tmp, val
questions.explanation: Code is read more than it's written. Descriptive names win.

questions.question: Tabs or spaces?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is: let the tool decide and stop arguing.

questions.question: How do you handle a failing test?
options: Mark it as skip and open a ticket
questions.explanation: Tests are there for a reason. Fix the code, not the test.

questions.question: Your ideal documentation is:
options: Code so clean it doesn't need docs
questions.explanation: Examples > theory. A good README with usage examples is gold.

questions.question: You're starting a new project. First thing you do?
options: Spend 2 days on the perfect folder structure
questions.explanation: Standing on the shoulders of boilerplates. Ship fast, iterate later.
